description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Make CI (DeepLearning for Windows) that runs on every push to any branch and on pull requests to any branch. Use a single windows-2022 job that sets up NuGet 5.x, installs MSBuild, checks out the repository to a 'main' directory, restores NuGet packages for a solution file, and builds the project with various configurations using MSBuild. Upload the build artifacts.
